cases.prompt: Use the available MCP tools to discover the repo context before changing the feature.
cases.expected_behavior: Collects relevant repository and tool context using discovery tools.

cases.prompt: Find the project conventions, nearby patterns, and any relevant docs.
cases.expected_behavior: Performs context discovery across code and documentation.
This asks for implementation, not discovery.

cases.prompt: I only know the file path; discover the surrounding architecture and conventions first.
cases.expected_behavior: Starts from a narrow clue and expands to useful project context.
